title: Rewrite app/api/matches/generate/batch/route.ts to call service directly
completion_summary: Replaced Python worker proxy with native generateBatchMatches service in batch route
acceptance_criteria: Route no longer imports getBackendConfig or getCircuitBreakerStatus
Route no longer fetches to PYTHON_WORKER_URL
Route imports and calls generateBatchMatches from match-generator service
Handles batch processing with appropriate timeout
No circuit breaker references (not needed without worker)
